query: 每个省份的下单用户数和订单数
sql: SELECT dr.region_name AS province_name, COUNT(DISTINCT dod.user_id) AS order_user_count, COUNT(DISTINCT dod.order_id) AS order_count FROM dwd_order_detail dod JOIN dim_region dr ON dod.province_id = dr.region_id WHERE dod.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 30) GROUP BY dr.region_name ORDER BY order_count DESC
explanation: 通过订单明细关联地区维度表，按省份统计下单用户数和订单数
